episode_title: The Condition You Did Not Know You Set — Chapter 1
episode_description: A self-worth reset for the Gen Z professional. Adi Da guides you through recognizing the invisible condition you set on your own worth.

narration_segments.text: Your jaw locks. The other's gaze triggers a familiar pull downward into the false self. This is what you came to see.

The team standup is happening and you just contributed something useful. Your manager nods and moves to the next person immediately. morning sun cutting through the blinds light doesn't change but your chest does. Your Zoom tile waits for acknowledgment that doesn't come. You unmute later anyway.

The team standup and your code review feedback was mechanical. Your manager's suggestions were layered and brilliant. Your Zoom tile is in the same grid but smaller somehow. Your WFH desk code is working but not impressive. You stop trying to be impressive.

LinkedIn notification shows your college roommate has been at their company for six years with four promotions. Your coffee shop table is where you compare timelines. morning sun cutting through the blinds years have passed and you're parallel not ahead. the avenue outside below moves toward futures that look different. You silence the notifications.
